title: 사랑하진 않는 연애 특징
text: Heewon Yeah? Then We're dating, right? Hmm We're not? I don't know What? We are dating, right? Should we? Really? Are we really dating? I mean, sure (A relationship that I am in alone) Then, it's our first day of dating today Or is it from tomorrow? Today? (Did you get up?) Did you break up? Why do you keep asking? Did you really break up? Yes What should you do now? What? You guys will keep running into each other in school We probably would Is this the reason why you shouldn't be a couple with someone from your major? Never do that Did you really break up? Yeah Did you get up? Yeah Are you at school? Yeah I'm at the convenience store because I have a break until the next class You must be feeling tired from sleeping late last night No, it's okay Oh, and also When should I tell the others that we are dating? Oh You want to tell the others? Yeah Let's just keep it a secret Why? I mean, we're all friends And it might make things awkward Wow This photo is nice Can I change it to my profile picture? No, you can't do that Why? Because it's a secret that we are dating Should we really keep it a secret? Yeah, becuase it might make things awkward Why would it make things awkward? I mean We could date and Break up? What? I didn't really mean it that way We have lots of mutual friends Hyunsu, things could also be awkward for you Those kinds of very complicated reasons Do you get what I'm saying? Right Okay Oh, I downloaded that (Dating for 3 days) Oh Do you also want to download it? Oh, should I? You already have downloaded it before? I probably didn't delete it before Oh Your ex? Should we use another application? You can just delete it right now, right? Oh, delete How can I delete this? Let me help you No, let me do it Should I do it like this? What happened? Huh? What happened? What? Why are you laughing? Because you aren't saying anything That's not true Nothing (Did you get home safe?) (I'm sorry for being a little mean a while ago) (Rest well and good night) (I love

title: 사랑하진 않는 연애 특징
text: like this? What happened? Huh? What happened? What? Why are you laughing? Because you aren't saying anything That's not true Nothing (Did you get home safe?) (I'm sorry for being a little mean a while ago) (Rest well and good night) (I love you) (Good morning) What are you doing? Oh, I have a stomachache Why? You want to go to the toilet? No Do you have indigestion? I am on my period Does it hurt a lot? Yeah What should I do? Just keep still Okay Do you want me to buy you something? Hi hi Jungwoo, did you submit your assignment? Did we have an assignment? Did you forget again? Here What is this? When you are on your period I heard that your stomach should be kept warm You can paste this directly to your skin Chack patch? How did you know this? I searched it up Really? It lasts for about 5 hours It lasts long Does it hurt a lot? Stop asking Okay I'll drop you home today No, I'm okay It's okay Why? I want to drop you home What are you talking about? I'm your boyfriend now and I can do that I am your boyfriend, right? You're going to miss your last bus You should get going now I want to drop you home I am really fine Heewon Do you really like me? I feel like you don't like me That's not true Then why don't you tell me that you like me? I didn't? I texted you that I love you and you didn't reply Really? For me I think of you and miss you for the whole day And what about you? But also It's weird to Say I love you as soon as you start dating What's weird? It's not weird? No, it's not You normally say that when you know the other person really well But you don't really know about me yet You think so? Okay Then we should get to know each other from now then What is the food that you like? Me? Tteokbokki? Oh, tteokbokki From which brand? Doesn't matter And what don't you like? Hmm jelly Why? I like it before But the tooth filling comes out if I eat jelly You have a lot of decayed teeth? Do you also have golden teeth? (Did you get home safe?) (Paste the chack patch when you go to bed) (The yellow one is calmy warm) (The purple one is satisfyingly warm) (The red one is good for people with cold hands and feet) (Thanks Hyunsu, I'll make good use of them)
